title: bus.tengine.worktree.leakage v1
description: When: The check_agent_leakage.sh hook detects that a worktree has files or processes that should not be present (worktree isolation was breached). Source: /tengine. Emitted as a critical violation indicating a defect in worktree lifecycle management.

host.description: Hostname of the machine that generated this event.

wt_id.description: Worktree identifier that experienced the leakage.

leaked_paths.description: Absolute paths to files or directories that leaked outside the expected worktree boundary.

hook_exit_code.description: Exit code returned by the check_agent_leakage.sh hook; non-zero indicates the leakage was detected.
